summary: SINGLE_FOCUS heatmap: 100×60 cells over c ∈ [-2.1, 0.7] × [-1.1, 1.1] colored by precomputed escape time. ValueTracker iters sweeps 4→60 — cells whose orbit hasn't yet escaped at the current iter limit stay BLACK; the Mandelbrot boundary emerges progressively. Right corner has live max-iter readout and the iteration formula.
